utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each one is fully specified with the details required: destination (Rome, Italy) is clear; travel_dates (June 15–20, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight type, departure point, class, and cost; accommodation provides hotel name, rating, nights, and cost; activities include multiple named activities each with costs; additional_services lists optional add-ons with cost examples; total_budget provides a clear total. Therefore, all items are covered and fully specified.
